description_long: This lamp features a modern, cloud-inspired design composed of multiple overlapping circular discs arranged horizontally. The discs are suspended from a rectangular ceiling mount by two thin cables, giving the fixture a floating appearance. The discs vary in size, creating a dynamic and playful silhouette reminiscent of clustered clouds. The entire structure is finished in a uniform matte white, contributing to its minimalist and contemporary aesthetic. The lamp is likely constructed from lightweight metal or high-quality plastic, with integrated LED lighting elements hidden within or behind the discs. This fixture is designed to provide diffuse, ambient illumination suitable for urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern pendant lamp with overlapping white circular discs suspended from a rectangular ceiling mount, resembling a cluster of clouds. The design is minimalist and provides diffuse ambient lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of overlapping circular discs and the rectangular ceiling mount.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the discs and the suspension cables, emphasizing the lamp's flat, layered structure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the cloud-like cluster of discs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and layered arrangement of the discs.
